from the album ?Vagabond Heart? (1991)

If only I?d have listened to all of my closest friends  
   C                 G/B           Am          F

  C               G/B         Am             F

If only I?d have realized the unimportance of being cool  
   C               G/B              Am              F  
To give a kiss and maybe just say ?darling I love you?  
  C                  G/B             Am                 F  
If only I?d said I?m sorry, I?d have been a much better man  
     Dm               F                C  
She?d still be in my arms tonight, if only  
  
  
          Am               C  
There?s an emptiness that fills my heart  
Em                  C  
Now that she?s not here  
  Am                      F  
I loved her more than my own life  
 Am                   Dm    F     C  
Something I?ve always feared, if only  
  
  
  C                G/B  
If only I had come home that night  
            Am                       F  
Instead of stayin? out for one more drink  
  C               G/B                  Am               F  
If only I?d been unconcerned what the other guys may think  
  C                       G/B          Am                  F  
If only I?d have held her tight, but I guess it?s too late now  
 Dm                F               C  
Oh how blind could one man be, if only

     C        G           F             C  
You live some   and you learn some, if only

<!----><!--2024-09-28 23:08:17-->  
Artist:        Diane Warren  
Title:         Faith of the Heart  
Album:         Patch Adams Soundtrack  
Performed by:  Rod Stewart  
  
These are the chords as I hear them from the Patch Adams Soundtrack performed  
by Rod Stewart.  I take no credit for this whatsoever.  I only wrote down the  
words and chords as I heard them.  Feel free to do whatever you want with this.  
  
Chords used:

       -------------  
A       X 0 2 2 2 0  
Bm      X 2 4 4 3 2  
C       X 3 2 0 1 0  
D       X 0 0 2 3 2

F       1 3 3 2 1 1  
F#m     2 4 4 2 2 2  
G       3 2 0 0 0 3  
       -------------  
  
Capo on 1st fret.  
  
VERSE 1  
  
               D          Bm           A        G  
   It's been a long road, gettin' from there to here  
               Bm                G       A       G  
   It's been a long time, but my time is finally near  
             F#m                                    G  
   And I can feel the change in the wind right now, nothing's in my way  
               Em7  
   And they're not gonna hold me down no more, no they're not gonna hold me down  
  
CHORUS 1  
  
   A            D            G                                    F#m  
   'Cause I got faith of the heart, I'm goin' where my heart will take me  
         D          G     F#m        G  
   I got faith to believe I can do anything  
   A     D               G                                F#m  
   I got strength of the soul, and no one's gonna bend or break me  
         Bm        E  
   I can reach any star  
         G             A                    D  E    G  
   I got faith.  I got faith.  Faith of the heart  
  
VERSE 2  
  
               D           Bm           A    G  
   It's been a long night, tryin' to find my way  
                   Bm                 G          A   G  
   Been though the darkness, now I've finally had my day  
              F#m                              G  
   And I will see my dream come alive at last, I will touch the sky  
               Em7  
   And they're not gonna hold me down no more, no they're not gonna change my mind  
  
CHORUS 2  
  
   A            D            G                                    F#m  
   'Cause I got faith of the heart, I'm goin' where my heart will take me  
         D          G     F#m        G

     A   D               G                                F#m

         Bm        E  
   I can reach any star  
         G       A            D  
   I got faith.  Faith of the heart  
  
BRIDGE  
  
C                                  F  
   I?ve known a wind so cold, I?ve seen the darkest days.  
C                                F  
   But now the winds I feel, are only winds of change.  
G                                 F  
   I?ve been through the fire and I?ve been through the rain.  
               A  
   But I?ll be fine...

<!----><!--2023-08-06 15:33:03-->  
  ***B       G#m    E  B  C#m  F#***  
I am sailing, I am sailing home again 'cross the sea.  
  ***C#m     G#m   C#m   B  F#***  
I am sailing stormy waters, to be near you, to be free.  
  ***B    G#m    E  B  C#m  F#***  
I am flying, I am flying like a bird 'cross the sky.  
   ***C#m      G#m      C#m   B F#***  
I am flying passing high clouds, to be near you, to be free.  
  
   ***B       G#m     E      B***  
Can you hear me, can you hear me, thru the dark night far away?  
  ***C#m     G#m      C#m     B F#***  
I am dying, forever trying to be with you; who can say?  
  ***B      G#m      E  B C#m F#***  
Can you hear me, can you hear me, thru the dark night far away?  
  ***C#m     G#m    C#m  B  F#***  
I am dying, forever trying to be with you; who can say?  
  
  ***B      G#m      E        B***  
We are sailing, we are sailing home again 'cross the sea.  
  ***C#m     G#m   C#m  B  F#***  
We are sailing stormy waters, to be near you, to be free.  
  
  ***F#    C#m     B***  
Oh Lord, to be near you, to be free.  
   ***F#    C#m    B***  
Oh Lord, to be near you, to be free.<!--n:Sailing:s:15226:e:1805-->

INTRO: E D A E D A E D A  
  
THEN: A B D A A B D A  
  
  
THE ENTIRE SONG CONSISTS OF PLAYING: A B D A OVER AND OVER.  
  
In the morning  
Don't say you love me  
Cause I'll only kick you out of the door  
  
I know your name is Rita  
Cause your perfumes smelling sweeter  
Since when I saw you down on the floor  
  
PLAY SLIDE OVER THESE CHORDS: A B D A  
guitar  
  
Won't need to much pursuading  
I don't mean to sound degrading  
But with a face like that  
You got nothing to laugh about  
  
Red lips hair and fingernails  
I hear your a mean old jezabel  
Lets go up stairs and read my tarot cards  
  
Stay with me  
Stay with me  
For tonight you better stay with me  
  
Stay with me  
Stay with me  
For tonight you better stay with me  
  
PLAY SLIDE OVER THESE CHORDS: A B D A - 2x's  
  
So in the morning  
Please don't say you love me  
Cause you know I'll only kick you out the door  
  
Yea I'll pay your cab fare home  
You can even use my best colonge  
Just don't be here in the morning when I wake up  
  
Stay with me  
Stay with me  
Cause tonight you better stay with me  
Sit down, get up, get down  
  
Stay with me  
Stay with me  
Cause tonight your going stay with me  
Hey, whats your name again  
oh no, get down, wooo  
  
OUTRO: PLAY SLIDE AND GO CRAZY OVER THESE CHORDS:  
(LIKE INTRO) E D A - PLAY ABOUT 7x's  
  
THEN END ON THIS: A Ab G F A Ab G F -SLIDE FROM A DOWN TO F<!--n:Stay with me:s:17063:e:1933-->
<!----><!--2025-12-21 22:12:35--><!--cover:-->Британский певец, автор песен, участник групп *The Jeff Beck Group*, *The Faces*.<!--n:about:s:19033:e:5929-->
